Paren Announces Advisory Board Members, Including Gabe Klein, Former Director of the U.S. Joint Office of Energy and Transportation Paren Inc., a leading provider of electric vehicle (EV) charging data analytics and insights, today announced the formation of its Advisory Board, chaired by Gabe Klein, former Director of the U.S. Joint Office of Energy and Transportation. The board, which also includes senior leaders from Google, Lyft, and Stanford's Graduate School of Business, will guide Paren in its path to continued growth.

AbbVie to Host Second-Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) will announce its second-quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, July 31, 2025, before the market opens. AbbVie will host a live webcast of the earnings conference call at 8 a.m. Central time. It will be accessible through AbbVie's Investor Relations website at investors.abbvie.com. An archived edition of the session will be available later that day.

Birmingham City Football Club Appoints Stephen Haines as Chief Commercial Officer New Revenue Streams Birmingham City Football Club is pleased to announce the appointment of Stephen Haines as Chief Commercial Officer New Revenue Streams, effective immediately. Haines brings with him nearly three decades of experience leading commercial strategy, brand partnerships, and global expansion at some of the world's most transformative companies. He joins Birmingham City at a pivotal moment, as the Club accelerates its evolution both on and off the pitch following its promotion to the Championship.

Vietnam's Viettel Group Excels at the Prestigious Global Technology Awards Recently, Viettel Group, a Vietnam state-owned corporation, won 19 awards at the Globee Awards for Technology 2025, one of the most prestigious international awards in the field of information technology and innovation. Viettel's total awards surpass global tech giants such as Amazon, IBM, Meta, Broadcom, Ivanti, Cisco, and more.
